description: Assyrian criminal organization active in southwestern Sydney, Australia, originating from the Assyrian Kings gang. Involved in drug trafficking, murders, and public shootings. Resurrected in the early 2000s under the name DLASTHR after the original gang dissolved following the murder of off-duty police officer David Carty in 1997.

country_links.evidence_quote: In March 2017, police discovered that the Assyrian crime gang was operating from Queensland's Gold Coast with drug distribution in the area.
country_links.context: The organization operates in Australia, with documented activities including drug supply, shootings, and stabbings in New South Wales and Queensland.

country_links.evidence_quote: In October 2006, Raphael Joseph was arrested in San Diego United States .
country_links.context: Raphael Joseph, a member of DLASTHR, was arrested in San Diego, United States, and later extradited to Australia.
